description.zh-cn: 经营数据看板：在后台汇总销售额、订单数、客单价、新增会员与每日趋势曲线，展示订单状态分布与热销商品 TOP，支持选择最近 7/30/90 天区间，帮助商家快速掌握经营概况。
description.en: Business dashboard: an admin overview of revenue, orders, AOV, new customers and daily trend lines, with order-status distribution and top-selling products, for the last 7/30/90 days.
